mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.image, p.brand, p.category_id, p.price, p.specs, p.review_count, pc.name as categoryName, (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM product_review WHERE product_id = p.id AND deleted = 0) as avgRating FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.image, p.brand, p.category_id, p.price, p.specs, p.review_count, p.follow_count, pc.name as categoryName, (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM product_review WHERE product_id = p.id AND deleted = 0) as avgRating FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.review_count DESC, p.follow_count DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
